q: Do you provide Bali airport pickup and drop-off?
a: Yes. We offer airport transfer service (pickup or drop-off) with private driver. Cars for 2–7 passengers and vans for 10–14 passengers are available.

q: Can I book a private day tour in Bali?
a: Yes. All packages can be private, and we can adjust the route (Ubud, Uluwatu, East Bali/Lempuyang, etc.) based on your hotel location and time.

q: Do you handle small groups and big groups?
a: Yes. We can arrange multiple cars or vans for small groups, families, and bigger groups.

q: What’s included in your tour packages?
a: Most packages include an English-speaking private driver, petrol & parking, cold water in an ice box, and hotel transfer back. Some packages also include lunch, equipment, instructors, and insurance (see each package details).

q: What’s excluded from the package price?
a: Entrance or activity fees are typically excluded unless stated. If you want us to include tickets, just tell us when booking.

q: Do you offer Nusa Penida and fast boat tickets to Gili?
a: Yes. We provide Nusa Penida packages and can help with fast boat tickets to Gili & Nusa Penida.

q: How do I book, and when do I pay?
a: Message us on WhatsApp with your date, hotel area, and group size. Booking now — pay on the day.

q: What language do your drivers speak?
a: Our drivers can communicate in English and will help with photos and videos during the trip.

q: What should I bring for temple visits and activities?
a: For temples: cover shoulders and knees (a sarong is often required). For water activities/snorkeling: bring swimwear, towel, sunscreen, and a change of clothes.
Yes. Tell us your must-see places and we’ll tailor the itinerary, timing, and stops to match your style.
